translate.title: Help Us Translate
translate.description: Make Morphe accessible to millions of users worldwide by translating it into your language
translate.step1-desc: Create a free Crowdin account. It only takes a minute and gives you access to translate Morphe and other open source projects.
translate.step2-desc: Select the language you want to translate into. You can contribute to new translations or improve existing ones.
translate.step3-desc: Use Crowdin's intuitive interface to translate strings. Every contribution helps make Morphe accessible to more users.
translate.step4-desc: Your translations will be reviewed and included in future Morphe releases, helping users around the world.
translate.why-subtitle: Every translated string brings Morphe closer to someone who needs it
translate.why-1-desc: Make Morphe available in your native language so everyone around you can enjoy it without barriers.
translate.why-2-desc: Reach millions of users across the world by bringing Morphe to new languages and regions.
translate.why-3-desc: Translation is a meaningful form of open source contribution — no coding skills required.
translate.why-4-desc: Your translations are reviewed and shipped in real Morphe releases, reaching users around the world.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: This website uses %s and Google Analytics 4: No cookies, no advertising, no profiling, and no data is sold or shared.
analytics.disclaimer: Morphe does not add analytics or data collection to any patched apps.

microg.title: Download
microg.description: The open-source core for your modded experience
microg.what-desc: MicroG is a lightweight, open-source reimplementation of Google Play Services. It provides the essential APIs that YouTube Morphe and YT Music Morphe need to function without the privacy concerns and resource drain of official Google services.
microg.gmscore-desc: The primary component that handles account authentication and push notifications (FCM), letting you sign in securely.
microg.unifiednlp-desc: A privacy-first location provider that lets apps determine position without reporting data to Google.
microg.proxy-desc: A small helper that allows apps to believe they are running on an official Google-certified device.
microg.auth-desc: Without MicroG, modded YouTube apps cannot connect to Google's authentication servers. MicroG acts as the secure bridge.
microg.push-desc: Enables real-time push notifications for new uploads and community posts via Google's Firebase Cloud Messaging.
microg.setup-step1-desc: Download the latest MicroG GmsCore APK from our official releases and install it like any regular app.
microg.setup-step2-desc: Open the MicroG Settings app on your device, tap 'Add Account', and sign in with your Google credentials.
microg.setup-step3-desc: Open YouTube Morphe or YT Music Morphe. You are now ready to enjoy a fully connected experience.

hero.title: Transform Your
hero.description: From the developers that brought you the greatest modded YouTube apps, comes Morphe - the powerful app modification tool that puts you in control

app-features.title: App Features
app-features.subtitle: Powerful patches for your favourite apps
app-features.youtube-desc: A customized YouTube experience with ad blocking, SponsorBlock support, enhanced player controls, and advanced privacy improvements
app-features.yt-ad-blocking-desc: Removes all ads from the home feed and video player for uninterrupted viewing.
app-features.sponsorblock-desc: Automatically skips sponsored segments and other non-essential parts of videos.
app-features.return-dislikes-desc: Displays community-powered dislike counts so you can make better viewing decisions.
app-features.yt-ui-desc: Hide Shorts, adjust navigation bar, and remove unwanted layout elements.
app-features.player-desc: Custom playback speeds, default video quality, and improved seekbar behavior.
app-features.swipe-desc: Adjust brightness and volume with intuitive touch gestures.
app-features.yt-themes-desc: Pure black, Material You, and additional theme styles.
app-features.yt-privacy-desc: Cleans sharing links by removing tracking parameters.
app-features.ytmusic-desc: An enhanced YouTube Music experience with ad blocking, customizable themes, audio improvements, and a cleaner interface
app-features.ytm-ad-desc: Removes all ads during music playback.
app-features.audio-desc: Disable dynamic range compression and prefer original audio tracks.
app-features.ytm-themes-desc: Custom dark and light backgrounds including Material You styles.
app-features.ytm-ui-desc: Hide unnecessary buttons and UI components for a cleaner experience.
app-features.repeat-desc: Improved repeat behavior that persists across sessions.
app-features.ytm-link-desc: Removes tracking parameters from shared links.
app-features.branding-desc: Optional app name and icon customization.
app-features.nav-bar-desc: Hide or customize the bottom navigation bar and its labels to reduce clutter.
app-features.reddit-desc: A streamlined Reddit experience with ad blocking, interface customization, direct link handling, and improved privacy
app-features.reddit-ad-desc: Removes in-feed advertisements for a cleaner browsing experience.
app-features.reddit-ui-desc: Hide navigation buttons, sidebar elements, and recommended shelves.
app-features.dismiss-desc: Automatically removes repetitive community warning popups.
app-features.direct-links-desc: Open links without redirect tracking, going directly to the destination.
app-features.reddit-link-desc: Removes tracking parameters from shared URLs for better privacy.
app-features.clean-nav-desc: Simplified layout with fewer distractions for focused browsing.
app-features.screenshot-desc: Disables the popup that appears when taking screenshots inside the app.
app-features.spoof-signature-desc: Spoofs the app signature to restore push notifications that may be broken after patching.

how-it-works.title: How Morphe Works
how-it-works.subtitle: Simple, powerful, and built for everyone
how-it-works.step1-desc: Download the latest version of Morphe and install it on your Android device.
how-it-works.step2-desc: Select the app you want to modify.
how-it-works.step3-desc: Morphe will automatically patch your selected app.
how-it-works.step4-desc: Install the patched app and enjoy your customized experience.

testimonials.title: What Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of users improving their Android experience

quote_1.text: Morphe is by far the most stable patcher I've used. The Material 3 design makes the whole experience feel premium and native.
quote_1.author: @tech_enthusiast

quote_2.text: The custom features for YouTube are a game changer. SponsorBlock and ad-blocking work flawlessly every time.
quote_2.author: @android_dev_99

quote_3.text: I love how easy it is to manage patches. The automation handles everything, so I can just enjoy my apps without the clutter.
quote_3.author: @creative_minds

quote_4.text: Finally, a patcher that respects privacy. Billions must download.
quote_4.author: @billions_must_patch

quote_5.text: The community support is amazing. If you have an issue, there's always someone willing to help on the Discord.
quote_5.author: @morphe_fan_01

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Morphe
faq.a1: YouTube, YouTube Music, and Reddit. More apps are being added — check our GitHub for the latest supported list.
faq.a2: Yes. Morphe is fully open source — anyone can inspect the code on GitHub. It doesn't touch system files, only modifies app packages. No root required.
faq.a3: No. Morphe only modifies the APK — it doesn't touch your system partition, bootloader, or anything else. Worst case, just uninstall the patched app.
faq.a4: No. Morphe works without root on any Android device. Just download, patch, and install.
faq.a5: We collect nothing. Morphe runs entirely on your device. The website uses privacy-respecting Umami analytics — no cookies, no tracking, no personal data.
faq.a6: From the Greek word for 'form' or 'shape' — because it morphs your apps into something better. Also because calling it AAMATT was a terrible idea.
faq.a7: Only if you want Google account login in patched YouTube/YT Music. Without MicroG, the apps work but you can't sign in.
faq.a8: Yes! See the contribution guidelines in our %1. If you don't have developer skills, we always appreciate %2 to help pay the bills.

community.subtitle: Follow us, report issues, and help make Morphe better
community.github-desc: Browse the source code, report bugs, and contribute to Morphe development.
community.x-desc: Stay up to date with the latest news, releases, and announcements.
community.reddit-desc: Join discussions, share tips, and connect with other Morphe users.
community.crowdin-desc: Help translate Morphe into your language and make it accessible to everyone.

donate.title: Support
donate.description: Your contribution helps us continue developing and improving Morphe
donate.why-1: Keep Morphe free and open source
donate.why-4: Enable faster bug fixes and features
donate.oc-desc: 100% transparent — see exactly how every dollar is raised and spent. One-time or recurring, any amount helps.
donate.tier1-desc: Buy us a coffee. A single contribution to show your appreciation — no commitment required.
donate.tier2-desc: Become a recurring supporter and help us plan for the long term. Your name appears on our backers list.
donate.tier3-desc: Get your logo or name prominently featured in the Mega Supporters section on the Morphe website.
donate.backers-empty: Be the first to support Morphe!
